description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was stopped on  Treat Ave, when a bicyclist riding on the wrong side of the street rode into the front 
bumper of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle did not incur any damage. There were no injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
